label: Glareward Stores
description: Glareward Stores forms a sealed service compartment set behind the canteen’s salvaged-bulkhead counter, built from the same ribbed hull plating used throughout Saltharrow Transit Anchorage. Narrow shelving bays and strap-lashed lockers line the walls, their fittings rated for orbital vibration and the station’s pronounced gravitic gradients. An amber task strip runs the ceiling length, maintaining the canteen’s glare-tempered illumination without admitting direct stellar radiance. Odor traps and pressure gaskets isolate the room from the adjacent concourse air discipline, preserving the canteen’s controlled atmosphere.
